title: Trump cancels housing bill signing, calls for SAVE America Act passage
shortDescription: President Trump abruptly canceled a big bill signing for landmark bipartisan housing legislation, saying the SAVE America Act is a bigger priority.

title: Trump will present World Cup trophy at final
shortDescription: President Donald Trump will be on hand to present the trophy at the World Cup final, FIFA President Gianni Infantino said.

title: What does the war in Iran cost?
shortDescription: Iran war drives $132B cost for Americans as gas prices, Strait of Hormuz tensions and fragile ceasefire keep markets on edge.

title: Trump asks DOJ to probe oil companies over prices
shortDescription: "Customers are being ‘gouged.’" President Donald Trump posted on Truth Social that he's asked the Department of Justice to probe oil companies.

title: Trump presses his agenda; Congress pushes back | The Excerpt
shortDescription: While Trump was attending the G7, he made some legislative calls that lawmakers weren’t thrilled about. Can they get on the same page with priorities?

title: Congressman says civil rights case unnecessary after coffee shop ban
shortDescription: "We don’t serve racists, fascists, homophobes, genocide enablers or anyone in between," the shop wrote.

title: Here's when to watch Trump's speech at the Great American State Fair
shortDescription: President Trump's speech on Wednesday, June 24, in Washington, D.C., to kick off the Great American State Fair can we watched on TV and streaming.

title: Trump asks for oil company probe over high gas prices
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said on social media that oil companies aren't dropping the price at the pump as quickly as their costs are going down.

title: Key takeaways from primary elections

title: Trump admin does not need to reinstall exhibits before USA's 250th, court says
shortDescription: The Trump administration does not need to reinstall dozens of exhibits it removed from national parks before the nation's 250th anniversary, a court ruled.

title: Will Trump's Great American State Fair kickoff be streamed online?
shortDescription: The Great American State Fair opening ceremony is Wednesday and will include remarks from President Donald Trump and a performance from Lee Greenwood.

title: Get ready for a Trump-Senate GOP showdown. Will sparks fly?
shortDescription: Trump is taking an unusual trek to Capitol Hill for what one Republican senator hopes will be "robust conversations."

title: Who got experimental Eli Lilly obesity drug? Not Trump, White House says
shortDescription: Pharmaceutical giant Eli Lilly gave an unidentified 79-year-old man exclusive access to an obesity and diabetes drug, media outlet STAT reported.

title: New housing bill targets affordability
shortDescription: A bipartisan housing bill in Congress targets affordability by boosting supply and cutting housing costs across the U.S.

title: Senate signals shift on Iran war
shortDescription: The Senate passed a symbolic War Powers resolution on Iran, signaling eroding GOP support.
